_comment: Ground-truth tags for a match — what actually happened, per the coach's eyes. The eval harness compares this to Gemini's output to compute precision/recall. Copy this template, rename to <match-name>.json, fill it in while watching the video.

events._comment_goals: Every goal in the match. Use 'us' or 'them' for scoring_team, or write the full color string. Timestamps as 'MM:SS' or seconds.

goals.note: Right-side initial shot saved, follow-up tap-in 6yd central
Right-wing dribble, square pass across goal, central tap-in
Winger right side, low pass to striker, opp intercept then poor pass into 6yd box, easy tap-in
Throw-in to centre, turn and run through middle, shot from outside box right channel, low left corner
Light Blue's only goal — fill in actual timestamp from the video

events._comment_saves: Every shot the GK faced (on or off target). gk_action is the canonical label: Catch / Block / Parry / Deflect / Punch / Missed / Goal / unclear. body_distance_zone is A (near body), B (within 2yd), C (full extension), or unclear.

saves.note: Close-range driven shot, central, blocked with body
Driven shot from 18yd, chest-height catch, held
Full-extension dive right, palm strike, ball goes wide for corner

_notes: If a save was a coaching highlight (e.g. a jaw-dropper), use note to say so — that helps prioritise which prompt failures to fix first.
If you're unsure on gk_action, leave it blank — the eval will still match by timestamp.
Off-target shots count as save events with on_target: 'no' and gk_action: 'unclear' (no save action required).
